positive: A minimalist, abstract mountain range silhouette depicted against a vibrant sunset gradient background. The mountains are solid, stylized peaks with clean, sharp edges, creating strong graphic contrast. The gradient should transition smoothly from deep indigo to warm tangerine orange, suggesting dawn or dusk. Incorporate subtle geometric patterns or stylized floral outlines into the sky or base, treated with negative space. Focus on perfect symmetry and a central composition, suitable for a clean, repeating pattern or single apparel print. Vector art style, highly detailed, clean lines, matte finish, strong contrast, graphic novel aesthetics, high saturation.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, words, watermark, logo, copyright, artifact, noise, messy, grunge, grainy, ugly, extra limbs, malformed, bad anatomy, photorealism
